FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Enum ToolTipPlacementMode

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

How the tooltip bubble is positioned — WinUI PlacementMode (the two modes ToolTipService actually drives): Top = centered above the TARGET, flipping on a collision (the WinUI default, ToolTip_Partial.cpp:1119-1122 "Fall back to the default - PlacementMode_Top"), the target rect inflated by the input-mode offset — 20px mouse / 12px keyboard (MousePlacementOffset); Mouse = at the last POINTER position, offset 11px below the cursor (ToolTip_Partial.h:56 m_mousePlacementVerticalOffset = 11; ToolTip_Partial.cpp:976-984 "align ToolTip with the bottom left corner of mouse bounding rectangle").

public enum ToolTipPlacementMode : byte

Fields

Mouse = 1
Top = 0
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
